mapper.select: SELECT role_id FROM sp_user_role WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sp_user_role (user_id, role_id, create_name, create_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{roleId}, #{createName}, #{createId})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM sp_user_role WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND role_id NOT IN
#{roleId}
